_comment: Source of truth for the homepage Quick Start tabs (plone_site_root/data.json). Each tab points at one or more real source files under docs/quickstart/. docs/sync.mjs reads this manifest, concatenates the files in order (joined by a blank line), and writes the result into the matching tab's code field. Edit the .vue/.jsx/.svelte/.html/.astro/.ts files — never edit the tab code in data.json directly. Order in this list controls tab order in the docs site.
